name: python3-docutils
title: python3-docutils
summary: text processing system for reStructuredText (implemented in Python 3)
description:
text processing system for reStructuredText (implemented in Python 3)
reStructuredText is an easy-to-read, what-you-see-is-what-you-get plaintext
markup syntax and parser system. It is useful for in-line program documentation
(such as Python docstrings), for quickly creating simple web pages, and for
standalone documents.
.
The purpose of the Docutils project is to create a set of tools for
processing reStructuredText documentation into useful formats, such as HTML,
LaTeX, ODT or Unix manpages.
.
This package includes Python 3 modules and command line utilities.

commands.description: generic command line interface for the docutils package

commands.name: rst-buildhtml
commands.description: convert many reST documents to HTML

commands.name: rst2man
commands.description: generate unix manpages from reStructured text

commands.name: rst2odt
commands.description: convert reST documents to OpenDocument text (ODT)

commands.name: rst2s5
commands.description: convert reST documents to S5 slides

commands.name: rstpep2html
commands.description: convert reST Python Enhancement Proposals to HTML

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use docutils because text processing system for reStructuredText (implemented in Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use docutils as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `docutils [options] [<source> [<destination>]]` as documented upstream for docutils.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair docutils with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `docutils --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.readme: docutils - generic command line interface for the docutils package
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install python-docutils. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `docutils [options] [<source> [<destination>]]`. text processing system for reStructuredText (implemented in Python 3).
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'install' phase against surfaces [local] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: text processing system for reStructuredText (implemented in Python 3).
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: docutils - generic command line interface for the docutils package.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install python-docutils
Install with: sudo apt install python-docutils
